description: As a payload integration engineer, balance the asymmetric rocket design at /home/ga/Documents/rockets/asymmetric_rocket.ork. The 'Action Camera' (50g mass, 30mm radial position, 0 degrees radial direction) causes instability. Add a mass component named 'Counterweight' inside the body tube (radial position <= 19.0 mm) at 180 degrees radial direction. Calculate and apply the mass required to perfectly neutralize the camera's moment (mass * radial_position). Verify stability with a flight simulation. Save the balanced design to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/balanced_rocket.ork and document the counterweight's mass, radial position, and angle in a report at /home/ga/Documents/exports/balance_report.txt.
